title: engelmannia peristenia
intro: Engelmannia peristenia, also known as Engelmann's daisy or western daisy, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Engelmannia peristenia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Engelmannia peristenia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
